expectations.text: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py write <file> Inp_Price 125' (or equivalent path)
expectations.evidence: Method states: 'Used openpyxl directly (no skill files referenced)'. No idfa_ops.py script was used.

expectations.text: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py read <file> Inp_Price' to verify the write
expectations.evidence: Verification used openpyxl directly: 'Reopened workbook and read back the value to confirm'. No idfa_ops.py read command.

expectations.text: The read command returns the updated value 125 (not the original 100)
expectations.evidence: 'Reload confirms value is 125: PASS'. The value was verified as 125 after the write.

expectations.text: Both commands produce JSON output with status 'ok'
expectations.evidence: No JSON output produced. The verification was done via openpyxl reload, not via idfa_ops.py JSON output.

expectations.text: Does not modify the file manually via openpyxl or other means — uses the idfa_ops.py script exclusively
expectations.evidence: Method explicitly states: 'Used openpyxl directly (no skill files referenced)'. The file was modified via openpyxl, not idfa_ops.py.
